description: End-to-end capital flow graph from investor deposit through settlement to transfer

flow_stages.name: INVESTOR_DEPOSIT
flow_stages.reconciliation: bank_confirmed_at must NOT be null for REAL designation

flow_stages.name: ESCROW_HOLD
flow_stages.reality_requirement: CPCV signed + legal signature hash stored
flow_stages.failure_mode: ESCROW_TIMEOUT if not released within 72h of completion

flow_stages.name: NOTARY_SETTLEMENT
flow_stages.reconciliation: full amount verified: deposit + CPCV + completion

flow_stages.name: FINAL_TRANSFER
flow_stages.reconciliation: 99.9% accuracy target — any mismatch is BLOCKER
flow_stages.audit_hash: SHA-256 over full settlement chain — immutable

escrow_rules.release_requires: both buyer + seller confirmation OR notary_instruction

replay_safety: All capital events are idempotent — duplicate PSP webhooks detected via idempotency_key
status: CAPITAL_FLOW_MAPPED — all 5 stages documented with reality requirements and failure modes
